name: Scotch Teas
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Brown sugar (C and H), firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter and brown sugar in a saucepan. Cook and stir until the butter melts.
2. Remove from heat. Stir in the remaining ingredients; mix well.
3. Pour into a greased 8-inch square pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes.
5. Cool, then cut into 24 bars.
NOTE: Cookies will seem soft when baked, but will harden when cold.
